D1.description: High-density reserved/special tuple extraction for v4 and v6

operations.pattern:

		const char\*\* rir,?
		const char\*\* reason,?
		const char\*\* confidence\)?
\{[\s\S]*??
\}

static void wc_preclass_set_v6_unknown_hint_result\(const char\*\* cls,?
		const char\*\* rir,?
		const char\*\* reason,?
		const char\*\* confidence\)?
\{[\s\S]*??
\}
